chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5834 of 2019 C.P. No.D-4628 of 2019 C.P. No.D-5835 of 2019 C.P. No.D-5836 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For orders as to maintainability of petition. 09.12.2021 None present for petitioners. Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG. Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-. Petitioner and his counsel are called absent. These petitions challenge show-causes notice under Section 122/122(5A) read with Section 111(d) of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. It appears that without responding to the show-cause notices, the jurisdiction of this Court is invoked without apparently satisfying the jurisdictional flaws for issuing such impugned notices, however, as record reflects, the petitioner’s counsel is not appearing in this case. He was called absent on the last date of hearing and so also today and there is no intimation either. Accordingly, these petitions are dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending application(s). Office is directed to place copy of this order in above connected matters. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
